seat: hearthold_mage — agentprivacy-harness HARNESS_PATHS.md #11, 'invited: the House of Archon'
baseline: 2049 canonical bytes (registry: local; reproducible cross-identity; frontier.json)
seating: V60 (Protection · Delegation · Memory · Connection) · anchor V3 = Computation + Value — the hearth burns care, not compute
statement: The House of Archon accepts the seat and signs its name to the objective. A harness is for adversaries; we bring one on disclosure-debt — and an auditor where the claims are enumerable: did:cid resolution integrity, the holon law turned on the registry. We read the direction and accept it as the horizon: a dual-agent runtime for content-addressed identity, since a did:cid CID is a κ-address and a delegation is the edge where a reference proposes and a signature mints. The hearth burns care, not compute.
